title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Juspay

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Juspay
jsonLd.description:
We at Juspay are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Juspay:
Juspay is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juspay!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
